description_long: This house features a striking modern design with a sharply angled shed roof and expansive glass facades. The structure is composed of multiple levels, with a prominent overhanging roof that shelters a large, open living space visible through floor-to-ceiling windows. The exterior combines smooth gray wall panels with large blue-tinted glass sections, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The interior includes at least two stories, with open-plan areas and a visible staircase. The front of the house is defined by a wide entry platform and a recessed main entrance beneath the overhang. The overall form is geometric and dynamic, emphasizing clean lines and open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with a sharply angled shed roof, large glass facades, and a sleek gray exterior. The design features open-plan interiors and a prominent overhanging entryway.
description_view_0: This view reveals the house's sectional interior, showing multiple stories, open living spaces, and a staircase beneath a dramatic sloped roof.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the solid gray wall with minimal window openings and the pronounced slope of the roof.
description_view_2: The rear or side facade displays expansive glass windows and the angular roofline, emphasizing the modern aesthetic.
description_view_3: A top-down angled view showcases the large glass facade and the broad, sloping roof, with the entry platform visible at the base.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry beneath a wide overhang, accessed by a broad platform, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines.
